neqsim.process.util.optimizer
Process optimization engine and constraint evaluation utilities.

    Method
    Description
    ConstraintPenaltyCalculator
    ConstraintPenaltyCalculator.addConstraint(ProcessConstraint constraint)

    Adds all constraints from a list.

    Auto-discovers and adds equipment capacity constraints from a process system.
